image.name: publisher_logo
image.path: firstfile( lower(${game_publi}) == 'activision' && {game:releasedate} >= '19920101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/activision1992.png" : lower(${game_publi}) == 'american softworks' && {game:releasedate} >= '19960101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/american softworks1996.png" : lower(${game_publi}) == 'american softworks' && {game:releasedate} >= '19930101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/universal interactive2002.png" : lower(${game_publi}) == 'universal interactive' && {game:releasedate} >= '19970101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/universal interactive1997.png" : lower(${game_publi}) == 'virgin' && {game:releasedate} >= '19970101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/virgin1997.png" : lower(${game_publi}) == 'virgin' && {game:releasedate} >= '19950101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/virgin1995.png" : lower(${game_publi}) == 'virgin' && {game:releasedate} >= '19940101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/virgin1989.png" : lower(${game_publi}) == 'warner bros. games' && {game:releasedate} >= '20050101T000000' ? "${themePath}/art/publisher/warner bros. games2005.png" : "${themePath}/art/publisher/" + lower(${game_publi}) + ".png", "${themePath}/art/publisher/" + lower(${game_publi}) + ".jpg")
